title: A Walk in Snowdonia
synopsis: A family walk in Snowdonia brings mountain air, quiet paths, and changing clouds.
sentences: Rafi and his parents spent the weekend in Snowdonia in North Wales.
On Saturday morning, they set out for a walk along a mountain path.
The air was cool, and low clouds moved across the peaks.
Rafi carried a small backpack with water and biscuits inside.
The path climbed gently beside a stream that made a soft, steady sound.
Every now and then, the clouds opened and showed a wide view of the valley below.
Rafi stopped often to look at sheep on the hillside.
His mother pointed out tiny purple flowers growing between the stones.
At the top of one rise, they sat down to rest and eat their lunch.
The wind was stronger there, but the view was worth it.
As they walked back down, the sun finally broke through the cloud.
Rafi felt tired by the end, but it was the good kind of tired that comes after a day outdoors.
